page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A tool for computing the coding potential of RNA transcript sequences using deep learning.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: RNAsamba is a tool for computing the coding potential of RNA sequences using a neural network classification model. It can be used to identify mRNAs and lncRNAs without relying on database searches.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RNAsamba is a tool for computing the coding potential of RNA sequences using a neural network classification model. It can be used to identify mRNAs and lncRNAs without relying on database searches.
